news.t: Madison Investments Lowers Fees on Two Fixed Income ETFs
Madison Investments Unveils MSTI, Latest Addition to Actively-Managed ETF Suite

overview.description: The Madison Short Term Strategic Income ETF (MSTI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking to generate a high level of income by investing in a diversified portfolio of US debt securities. The fund aims to maintain an average portfolio duration of 3.5 years or less MSTI was launched on Sep 5, 2023 and is issued by Madison.

data.title: Madison Investments Lowers Fees on Two Fixed Income ETFs
data.text: Madison Investments announced reduced fees for its two fixed income ETFs: Madison Aggregate Bond (Ticker: MAGG) and Short Term Strategic Income (MSTI).

data.title: Madison Investments Unveils MSTI, Latest Addition to Actively-Managed ETF Suite
